The third umpire will have a look - was it above waist high? It's not a front-foot no-ball, seems it's okay on height and the catch is clean. Holder is . Holder walks back gutted, has a chat with umpire Langton Rusere about the height, but it was the third umpire's call and he felt it was good. Sweet connection and it was really travelling but Rajapaksa's reflexes were top-notch, diving across to his left to grab this out of nowhere. It's getting from bad to worse for the defending champs.
